{{Infobox character
| name = Elderspawn spider
| introduced = ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn
}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Elderspawn]] [[spiders]] are creatures that scuttle over surfaces in the [[library]].}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
